title: CT12.compute.restoration automation-first node contract
description: An exact projection of the compiled predecessor-indexed Lean node, including its proof-instance boundary and framework-generated outputs.

presentation.summary: Compiled computation node with an explicit automation contract.
presentation.label: CT12.compute.restoration

outgoingEdges.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT12.Capability P} →
    {n : ℕ} →
      {state : capability.State (n + 1)} →
        capability.Peeled state →
          capability.DemandResidual →
            CT12.Graph.Edge capability CT12.Graph.NodeId.restoration CT12.Graph.NodeId.demandTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT12.Capability P} →
    {n : ℕ} →
      {state : capability.State (n + 1)} →
        capability.Peeled state →
          capability.TierResidual →
            CT12.Graph.Edge capability CT12.Graph.NodeId.restoration CT12.Graph.NodeId.tierTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT12.Capability P} →
    {n next : ℕ} →
      {state : capability.State (n + 1)} →
        capability.Peeled state →
          capability.State next →
            next < n + 1 → CT12.Graph.Edge capability CT12.Graph.NodeId.restoration CT12.Graph.NodeId.decrease
